mapper.select:
SELECT i.issue_code, i.project_code, i.status_code, s.code_id AS status_id, i.title, i.priority, i.assignee_code, i.created_by_code, i.created_at, i.due_at, i.started_at, i.resolved_at, i.updated_at, CASE WHEN i.due_at IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(i.due_at) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 100 ELSE i.progress END AS progress, i.position, i.file_code,
p.project_name, p.status AS project_status, cps.code_name AS project_status_name,
cs.code_name AS status_name, cp.code_name AS priority_name,
ua.name AS assignee_name, uc.name AS creator_name,
i.type_code, t.type_name
FROM issues i JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code AND s.project_code = i.project_code
LEFT JOIN common_code cs ON cs.code_id = s.code_id AND cs.group_code = 'OB'
LEFT JOIN common_code cp ON cp.code_id = i.priority AND cp.group_code = 'OA'
LEFT JOIN common_code cps ON cps.code_id = p.status AND cps.group_code = 'OD'
LEFT JOIN users ua ON ua.user_code = i.assignee_code
LEFT JOIN users uc ON uc.user_code = i.created_by_code
LEFT JOIN types t ON t.type_code = i.type_code
WHERE 1 = 1
AND i.project_code IN
#{code}
AND p.status IN ('OD1', 'OD3')
AND (
( i.project_code IN
#{code}
AND p.status IN ('OD1', 'OD3') )
OR
( i.project_code IN
#{code}
AND p.status = 'OD1' )
)
AND i.project_code = #{projectCode}
ORDER BY i.issue_code DESC

SELECT i.issue_code, i.project_code, i.status_code, i.title, i.description, i.priority, i.assignee_code, i.created_by_code, i.created_at, i.due_at, i.started_at, i.resolved_at, i.updated_at, CASE WHEN i.due_at IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(i.due_at) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 100 ELSE i.progress END AS progress,
i.position, i.file_code,
i.par_issue_code, pi.title as par_issue_title,
s.code_id AS status_id,
p.project_name, p.status AS project_status, cps.code_name AS project_status_name,
cs.code_name AS status_name, cp.code_name AS priority_name,
ua.name AS assignee_name, uc.name AS creator_name,
ad.original_name, ad.path AS file_path, at.uploaded_at,
i.type_code, t.type_name,
i.reject_code, ir.reason AS reject_reason, ir.rejected_by, ur.name AS rejected_by_name, ir.rejected_at
FROM issues i LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code
JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code
LEFT JOIN common_code cs ON cs.code_id = s.code_id AND cs.group_code = 'OB'
LEFT JOIN common_code cp ON cp.code_id = i.priority AND cp.group_code = 'OA'
LEFT JOIN common_code cps ON cps.code_id = p.status AND cps.group_code = 'OD'
LEFT JOIN users ua ON ua.user_code = i.assignee_code
LEFT JOIN users uc ON uc.user_code = i.created_by_code
LEFT JOIN attachments_detail ad ON ad.file_code = i.file_code AND ad.is_used = 1
LEFT JOIN attachments at ON at.file_code = ad.file_code
LEFT JOIN issues pi ON i.par_issue_code = pi.issue_code
LEFT JOIN types t ON t.type_code = i.type_code
LEFT JOIN issue_rejects ir ON ir.reject_code = i.reject_code
LEFT JOIN users ur ON ur.user_code = ir.rejected_by
WHERE i.issue_code = #{issueCode}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(issue_code), 0) + 1 FROM issues
INSERT INTO issues
issue_code, project_code, status_code, title, created_by_code, created_at,
type_code,
description,
priority,
assignee_code,
due_at,
progress,
par_issue_code,
VALUES
#{issueCode}, #{projectCode},
(SELECT s.status_code FROM status s WHERE s.project_code = #{projectCode} AND s.code_id = #{statusId}),
#{title}, #{createdByCode}, SYSTIMESTAMP,
#{typeCode},
#{description},
#{priority},
#{assigneeCode},
#{dueAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CASE WHEN #{dueAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(#{dueAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 100 ELSE #{progress} END,
#{parIssueCode}
mapper.update:
UPDATE issues
title = #{issue.title}, description = #{issue.description}, priority = #{issue.priority},
par_issue_code = #{issue.parIssueCode},
par_issue_code = NULL,
assignee_code = #{issue.assigneeCode},
status_code = ( SELECT s.status_code FROM status s WHERE s.project_code = #{issue.projectCode} AND s.code_id = #{issue.statusId} ),
due_at = #{issue.dueAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
started_at = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN #{issue.startedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} ELSE started_at END,
resolved_at = #{issue.resolvedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
progress = CASE WHEN NVL(#{issue.dueAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, due_at) IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(NVL(#{issue.dueAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, due_at)) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 100 ELSE NVL(#{issue.progress}, progress) END,
type_code = #{issue.typeCode},
updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE issue_code = #{issueCode} AND (#{issue.parIssueCode} IS NULL OR #{issue.parIssueCode} != #{issueCode})
UPDATE issues SET reject_code = #{rejectCode}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE issue_code = #{issueCode}

UPDATE issues SET status_code = ( SELECT s.status_code FROM status s WHERE s.project_code = #{projectCode} AND s.code_id = #{statusId} ),
started_at = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL AND #{statusId} != 'OB1' THEN SYSTIMESTAMP ELSE started_at END,
progress = CASE WHEN due_at IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(due_at) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 100 WHEN #{statusId} = 'OB1' THEN 0 WHEN #{statusId} = 'OB3' THEN 95 WHEN #{statusId} = 'OB4' THEN 50 WHEN #{statusId} = 'OB5' THEN 100 ELSE progress END,
resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{statusId} = 'OB5' AND resolved_at IS NULL THEN SYSTIMESTAMP ELSE resolved_at END,
updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE issue_code = #{issueCode}
mapper.select: SELECT ir.reject_code, ir.issue_code, ir.rejected_by, ur.name AS rejected_by_name, ir.rejected_at, ir.reason AS reject_reason FROM issue_rejects ir LEFT JOIN users ur ON ur.user_code = ir.rejected_by WHERE ir.issue_code = #{issueCode} ORDER BY ir.rejected_at DESC, ir.reject_code DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE issues SET status_code = ( SELECT s.status_code FROM status s WHERE s.project_code = #{projectCode} AND s.code_id = 'OB3' ),
started_at = NVL(started_at, SYSDATE),
progress = CASE WHEN due_at IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(due_at) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 100 ELSE 95 END,
file_code = #{fileCode}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE issue_code = #{issueCode}
